parsed_output.justification: Dylan claims to be the Drunk, but later asserts that there are two Werewolves in the center and thus no Werewolves are in play. This is a logical contradiction because the Drunk role has no ability to see the center cards. Furthermore, Kelsey also claims to be the Drunk, meaning at least one of them is lying. Dylan's attempt to convince the group that no Werewolves are in play is a common bluff used by Werewolves or Minions to avoid being voted out.
